programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the tricky dessert course and the last chance for the Welsh chefs to secure their place in tomorrows regional final. With everything to play for, the pressure is fierce. Only two can make it through, and one will leave the competition for good.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Two remaining Welsh chefs cook their four courses again for the judges and Rosemary Bishton. One chef will be chosen to represent Wales in the National Finals taking them a step closer to cooking at the banquet.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of Northern Irelands top chefs - Chris McGowan, Danni Barry and Ben Arnold - go head to head with their starter courses to impress this weeks veteran judge. Former champion Chris is back for glory and determined to reach the banquet, but hes up against two newcomers with their sights firmly set on victory.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Chris McGowan, Danni Barry and Ben Arnold are cooking their fish courses. Ambitious Ben is determined to steal Chriss regional crown, but under fierce scrutiny from this weeks formidable veteran, will the pressure to deliver spell melt down?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a battle for the main course for three of Northern Irelands finest chefs - Chris McGowan, Danni Barry and Ben Arnold. Ambitious Ben is out to prove himself with a perfect lamb main course.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its dessert day and the Northern Irish chefs are all striving for one of the two spots in the Regional Final. The pressure is intense, and in the end one chef must leave the competition empty handed.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining North Irish chefs are cooking all four courses again for the judges - Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by a guest judge - award winning food writer Felicity Cloake.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Mini Patel, Michael OHare and Tim Allen are going head to head this week for a chance to represent the North East region in the National Finals. Today its a battle for starter course, and the first chance to impress their formidable veteran chef.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the fight for the fish course, as three of the North Easts finest chefs - Mini Patel, Michael OHare and Tim Allen - are out to impress. After his risky starter caused a stir yesterday Michael is planning another controversial dish in honour of the WIs support of womens rights.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of the North Easts most dynamic chefs - Mini Patel, Michael OHare and Tim Allen - go head to head cooking their main courses. Michelin starred Tim is super keen to bag the first ten of the week, but Michael and Mini are hot on his heels.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the North East chefs last chance to impress with the dessert course. Its been a week of highs and lows, modern audacious dishes and classic masterpieces but with only two places up for grabs cooking for the judges, at the end of today who will leave the competition empty handed?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining North East chefs must cook all four courses again for the judges - Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by a guest judge - WI president Kirsty Bowen from Sheffield - who will help decide which chef will go through to represent the North East in the National Finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Representing the North West are Eve Townson, Matt Worswick and returning contender Mark Ellis. Todays the starter course, and after failing to cook for the judges last year Marks out to redeem himself but he faces stiff competition in executive chef Eve and young gun Matt.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the fish course, as three of the North Wests finest chefs - Eve Townson, Matt Worswick and Mark Ellis - go head to head. Eve and Matt are hoping their classic approach to cooking fish will win the day whilst Mark is going all out with fishy take on a traditional dessert recipe.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle for the main course for the three North West chefs - Eve Townson, Matt Worswick and Mark Ellis. Mark remains determined and focused on his battle to get to judges chamber this year, but as the pressure to plate up perfection reaches fever pitch, will all three chefs get a dish to the pass?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the North West chefs last chance to impress, with the dessert course. Only two can cook for the judges tomorrow. Its the end of the road for one chef, but who will it be?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining North West chefs cook their entire menus again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by award winning food writer Sabrina Ghayour and together theyll decide which chef will go on to represent the North West in the National Finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the starter course for three of London and the South Easts hottest chefs - Matt Gillan, Lee Westcott and Marcus Wareings protege Mark Froydenlund. Returning contender Matt Gillan is determined to make it to this years banquet, but he faces fierce competition in the two newcomers.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The London and South East chefs - Matt Gillan, Lee Westcott and Marcus Wareings protege Mark Froydenlund - go head to head with their fish courses. Lee is hoping his modern plate of mackerel and passion fruit will outclass Matt and Marks more traditionally inspired salmon dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a battle for the main course for three of London and the South Easts finest chefs - Matt Gillan, Lee Westcott and Mark Froydenlund. Returning contender Matt is determined to bring home a 10 with his ambitious celebration of the billy goat but has he bitten off more than he can chew?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its dessert day and the London and South East chefs are striving to secure one of the two spots in tomorrows Regional Final. The scores are close, so its all to play for, as today marks the end of the competition for one man.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining London and South East chefs are cooking all four courses again for the judges - Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by Mary Gwynn, author of the official WI centenary cookbook. Together theyll decide which chef goes through to represent the region in the National Finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of the Central Regions finest chefs - Pip Lacey, Richard Bainbridge and Jason Hodnett - attempt to impress this weeks veteran judge with their starters. With big boots to fill, Angela Hartnetts protege Pip is the only newcomer in the kitchen. Will she beat the boys to claim victory?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three Central Region chefs - newcomer Pip Lacey, 4th time competitor Richard Bainbridge and returning chef Jason Hodnett - fight it out for the fish course. Pip is hoping to outclass her rivals with a smoked haddock dish inspired by her Grandma.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a battle for the main course with three Central Region chefs - Pip Lacey, Richard Bainbridge and Jason Hodnett. Once again Jason is taking risks with his unusual collection of ingredients.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the last chance for the Central Region chefs to impress, with the dessert course. Only two chefs can go through to cook for the judges so with everything to play for, who will plate up perfection and who will be sent packing?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining Central Region chefs cook their entire menus again for the judges - Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyll be joined by former chair of the Womens Institute Helen Carey, who will help decide who will have the glory of representing the region in the National Finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the starter course, and 8 of the finest chefs in the country are battling it out to plate up impeccable dishes worthy of the Womens Institute. The judges are joined by WI Calendar Girl Angela Baker, but after Oliver reveals that this year it will be much tougher to make it onto the judges shortlist, who will keep their cool and secure a place?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle for the fish course, and those chefs who didnt make it onto the shortlist with their starters are hoping to do better. The judges are joined by a WI president, Kristy Bowen, who knows the impeccable standards the Institute will expect.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its main course day, the half-way point in Finals Week, and those chefs who have yet to get a dish on the shortlist are feeling the heat. With only dishes judged to be perfect in with a chance at reaching the WI banquet, the standards are higher than ever before.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a battle for dessert, and the last chance for the 8 regional champions to get a dish in contention for the final banquet. Those whove failed to make the judges shortlist so far are going all out. Joining the judges is author of the WI centenary cookbook Mary Gwynn.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The banquet is finally here. Its the culmination of months of hard work as the winning chefs strive to plate up perfect dishes for the ladies of the Womens Institute, at Londons historic Drapers Hall where pioneers of the WI once gathered.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three chefs meet their surprise veteran judge and cook their summery starters. A dish celebrating childhood summer memories takes on a complicated courgette dish and a technically tricky take on the cucumber sandwich.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The atmosphere in the kitchen gets even more intense as all the chefs take risks with their dishes. Mike Reid, Executive Chef at M Restaurants in London, shocks with when he pairs his fish with some highly unusual flavours.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a smoke filled kitchen as the three chefs prepare their summer themed mains in the hope of impressing the veteran judge. Selin Kiazim is in her element, cooking a feast inspired by the summer barbecues she enjoyed with her family.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: All three chefs are feeling the pressure as they attempt their technical summer desserts. With only the two highest scorers going through to tomorrows regional final, who will be sent home?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining London and the South East chefs must cook their entire taste of summer menus again. Theyre hoping to impress the formidable panel of judges: nd for the first time this year, broadcaster and restaurateur Andi Oliver.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs have been challenged to create outstanding dishes that capture a `taste of summer. Their menus must reflect the tastes, smells and colours of everybodys favourite time of year.

programme.desc: Its the fish course and with a seafood specialist in the kitchen the competition is stepping up a gear. Tom is hoping hell be able to elevate the humble mackerel to the standards required for the Wimbledon banquet.

programme.title: Catherine De Medici The Black Queen Of France
William the Conqueror
programme.desc: In 10066, William the Conqueror is about to embark from Dives-sur-Mer for the conquest of England. In the event that he does not come back alive, Guillaume presents his son Robert to his faithful barons.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Joann Fletcher discovers what life was really like for ordinary Egyptians 3,500 years ago, during the height of the incredible civilisation of ancient Egypt. Joann explores how people lived during this time, from the tightly packed houses and villages of the common people, to the clothes they wore and the food they ate.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Joann Fletcher reveals a strange and mysterious world: the ancient Egyptian afterlife. To them waking life was just a dress rehearsal. Joann clambers into rarely visited tombs, explores a treasure trove of long-buried objects and examines spectacular mummies to discover just why the Egyptians spent a fortune preparing for death.

programme.title: Egypt: Behind the Revolution
programme.desc: Filmed primarily in Egypt in March of 2011, soon after the January revolution, this film introduces you to the Egyptians who lived under Mubarak and helped to bring him down.

programme.title: Cuba: The Forgotten Revolution
programme.desc: Cuban revolutionaries Frank País and Jose Antonio Echeverría play critical roles in the overthrow of Fulgencio Batista.

programme.title: The Russian Revolution
programme.desc: The Russian Revolution in 1917 changed the course of history. Two families go to war: Lenins Ulyanovs and the Tsars Romanovs. With assassinations, popular revolt, and a daring seizure of power, the twentieth century is changed forever.

programme.title: Simon Sebag Montefiore on Stalin
programme.desc: Find out how Stalin climbed to the top of Soviet politics and hear how his paranoia shaped the way he ruled.

programme.title: Flying Through Time
programme.desc: Exploring the early development of the aircraft carrier and one of historys best-ever fighter planes, the Grumman Hellcat.

programme.title: Flying Through Time
programme.desc: The Grumman F-14 Tomcat is amongst todays ultimate weapons. It is 63 feet long and has a maximum speed of nearly twice that of sound.

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky
programme.desc: This episode looks at Biggin Hill.

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky
programme.desc: From the UKs first flight to the modern-day jet engine, Jules Hudson discovers Farnboroughs incredible contribution to air science and research.

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky
programme.desc: Jules Hudson heads to Duxford, the home of Douglas Baders Big Wing during the Battle of Britain and an aerodrome that welcomed thousands of GIs in WWII.

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky
programme.desc: Join Jules Hudson at Europes largest surviving WW1 aerodrome where he explores the stories of Britains first pilot heroes.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Aviation
programme.desc: From the exhilarating and perilous days of early flight, exploring the inspiration that drove innovators like Benjamin Franklin and Leonardo Da Vinci who envisioned new ways to give man wings.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Aviation
programme.desc: The Amazing World of Aviation covers both historical and modern day aeronautical achievements, as well as looking to the future of aviation.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Aviation
programme.desc: Aircraft designers push aeronautical technology boundaries, accelerating the industry in the decades after the First World War. Visionaries hold the keys to success as commercial markets open up.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Aviation
programme.desc: Exploring how flying became a business. New opportunities emerge, including skywriting and sightseeing tours, as flying grows into a more significant feature of life worldwide.

programme.title: Remember Pearl Harbor Narrated by Tom Selleck
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941, Japanese planes dropped torpedoes and bombs on an American Pacific fleet at Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: The Boys of H Company
programme.desc: The battle of Iwo Jima cost the lives of nearly 6,000 US marines. Follow astonishing stories of some of the young, inexperienced warriors who fought for control of the tiny volcanic island.

programme.title: Flying Through Time
programme.desc: Exploring the early development of the aircraft carrier and one of historys best-ever fighter planes, the Grumman Hellcat.

programme.title: Flying Through Time
programme.desc: The Grumman F-14 Tomcat is amongst todays ultimate weapons. It is 63 feet long and has a maximum speed of nearly twice that of sound.

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky

programme.desc: Jules Hudson heads to Duxford, the home of Douglas Baders Big Wing during the Battle of Britain and an aerodrome that welcomed thousands of GIs in WWII.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In the North, the remains of a Tudor house in Leicestershire were thought to be the childhood home of Englands forgotten Queen, Lady Jane Grey. But when archaeologists excavate, they find more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Britains Greatest Obsessions
programme.desc: Lorraine Kelly explains our constant harking back to Winston Churchill and the part played by Britain in the Allied victory.

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.desc: Revealing the greatest codes known to humanity and the brilliant minds that manage to solve them.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Cardiff castle over more than 2,000 years and reveals how it became transformed from a strategically important Roman and Norman stronghold to a lavish fairy-tale Victorian home.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: In medieval England, the North was ruled from York. Dan Jones explores the history of its castle, from the Viking Jorvik and the Normans, through the dark days of the anti-Jewish pogrom and the imprisonment of the Knights Templar, to one of its most colourful inmates - the legendary highwayman Dick Turpin.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: In York, Professor Alice Roberts takes part in a Viking battle, meets the metal detectorists behind one of the UKs greatest archaeological finds, and gets her hands on Viking poo.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice tells the story of Norman England by studying the history of Winchester, Britains most Norman city. Alice attempts to storm a castle in chain mail, investigates the origins of modern surgery and tucks in to an appetising eel pie.

programme.title: Ancient Superstructures
programme.desc: In Cambodia, Asia, lies the largest religious building ever built by man: the temple of Angkor Wat. Covering 160 hectares, it is the largest of the 112 Khmer temples lost in 400 km2 of jungle.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Battle of Culloden: Rick and Beau return to tackle new rivers in a brand-new series. From Wales to Scotland, the pair investigate the cold and murky waters of historic sites. (1 of 3)

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Find out how a lobster led archaeologists to the discovery of an 8,000-year-old Neolithic underwater settlement. Join a team at a secret location in Dorset as they excavate an Iron Age crouched burial and in Londons East End,location reporter Naoise Mac Sweeney visits a modern construction site as it gives up the secrets of an Elizabethan playhouse.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt for archaeology from the more recent past as they follow the search for artefacts from World War II. They join marine archaeologists in the Solent as they raise the once-in-a-lifetime find of a Fairey Barracuda divebomber. More than 2,500 Barracudas were in service during the war but not a single complete plane survives today. Naoíse Mac Sweeney joins the post excavation to reveal how the find could help bring this rare aircraft back to life.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: In medieval England, the North was ruled from York. Dan Jones explores the history of its castle, from the Viking Jorvik and the Normans, through the dark days of the anti-Jewish pogrom and the imprisonment of the Knights Templar, to one of its most colourful inmates - the legendary highwayman Dick Turpin.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: With the aid of dramatic reconstruction, Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of the beautiful Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon familys manor and Norman stronghold to the private property of six medieval queens, a Tudor palace, a Jacobean country house, a Georgian mansion and an elegant 20th-century retreat for the rich and famous.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores the story of Stewart Britain by visiting Stirling, the home of the Scottish royals who eventually took the English throne in 1603 and created Great Britain.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice is in Lincoln, getting to grips with life in medieval England. She visits the magnificent cathedral that was once the tallest building in the world and re-lives the battle at Lincoln Castle.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson is out to discover why Pembrokeshire feels so English. There are castles everywhere and it boasts one of the countrys finest cathedrals, sure signs that the Normans stamped their mark all over this little slice of Wales.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits the British Channel Islands, which were occupied by Nazi Germany for five years between 1940 and 1945.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice discovers things at Norwich Castle Museum which highlight facts about Tudor life, Anglo-Saxon childbirth rituals, and the Pompeii of the Bronze Age.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: A look back at the best archaeological findings of 2014, including the Barrow Clump, Ipplepen and Winchester sites.

programme.title: Ancient Superstructures
programme.desc: Researchers are using new technologies to take a closer look at the Louvre and its past.

programme.title: Ancient Superstructures
programme.desc: A walk through the iconic mausoleum complex, located in India and commissioned in 1632 by the Mughal emperor Shah Jahan to house the remains of his beloved wife.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: River Hunters sees Rick and river-searching expert Beau searching the unexplored rivers and waterways of Britain, unearthing treasures from the past which reveal how our various ancestors used to live.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A journey to some of the mysteries of how the early Celts emerged and expanded, from collapsed salt mines, to bizarre rituals and lost cities.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tonys walk takes him back to 1940 when the sleepy county of Dorset became the frontline in the war against Hitler. His five-day, 60-mile walk along the Jurassic coast reveals the countys hidden World War II story. Starting by the defences on Chesil Beach, Tonys journey encompasses stunning scenery and amazing acts of ingenuity and bravery as he heads east to finish in Swanage and Studland Bay.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson goes for a walk through some of Britains beautiful and historic landscapes. Tony kicks off the series with a 40-mile walk through the glorious Peak District, along the Derwent Valley, where the worlds industrial revolution was born. This is a journey that reveals how Britain transformed itself from a nation of farmers into the industrial powerhouse of the world.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy meets a young family originally from Estonia who create a wonderful family home for themselves in Walthamstow in London and Martin is in St Day in Cornwall looking around a village barn ripe for conversion.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits Shropshire, and there is a seaside feel as he and Lucy Alexander tour properties near the coast in Folkestone and Cornwall.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts looks round a large 1970s detached house in a quiet Derbyshire village, before calling into an enormous Georgian flat in Shropshire. Meanwhile, Lucy Alexander pops into a small former hair salon in Kent, but will it go for a snip?

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander is in Deal in Kent, looking round a flat moments from the water. Meanwhile, Martin looks round houses in Crewe and Derby. All three properties are very different, but each investor is looking to turn a profit.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: The trio look at a family home in Kent, a former bar in Llanelli in Wales and a terrace in Croydon, all sold at auction. Will any of the developers make a return on their investments?

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A three-bedroom semi in Crewe, a top-floor flat in London and a terraced house in Oldham are sold under the hammer. All the owners are happy with the prices they paid, but will any of them be able to turn a profit at the end of the projects?

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: While developers in Croydon in Surrey and Donnington in Shropshire wrestle with the question of whether to lose a bedroom each for a better placed kitchen or bathroom, two friends in Derby consider creating two more in their six-bedroom house.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Two brothers buy a rundown cottage in Probus in Cornwall, a father buys a flat in Mitcham in Surrey as a long-term investment for his young daughter and a seasoned property developer buys a house in Tunstall in Stoke-on-Trent for her daughter.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion is in Plaistow in London looking around a three-bedroom semi, Lucy is checking out a small piece of land in Crayford in Kent, and Martin meets a father and son who have bought a small house with a big garden in Wheelock in Cheshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Hells Kitchen USA

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A left-wing politicians speech causes problems for cop Nick Rowan, and the American-run early warning defence system becomes a target for a big CND demonstration. Workers take offence when demonstrators are putting up posters everywhere advertising the demo and Nick has to get in the middle of trouble.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A love story between a gypsy and the vicars daughter unfolds. When Lazlos caravan arrives in Aidensfield, the villagers soon make it clear the gypsy family are not welcome in their midst. The vicars daughter falls for the young and handsome Milos Laszl and this angers her wealthy fiancee.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Aidensfield becomes the scene of a murder hunt when a retired top London policeman is shot dead. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police Constable Nick Rowan swaps the rural atmosphere of Aidensfield for the grime and crime when he returns to London. Meanwhile, Greengrass ends up in court and Alan Maskell who is on bail does a runner to London, but unknown to him his wife Sandra has some bad news.

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: Flamboyant mature student Gary plans a fun-filled evening in Hastings. Theres fancy dress, diabolical dancing, fits of giggles and tactless table manners. And a guest puts his foot in it.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Hastings, former pop star Dec plans some musical surprises and a simple seaside menu, on a night featuring revelations, celebrity stories, magical musical moments and a peculiar pudding.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty therapist Chiara throws an Italian dinner party in Sussex. But Irish crooner Dec compares his host to a page three glamour girl, and Garys in a fluster when he woos Emily.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit this week is to The Lazy Pug in Warwickshire. Friends Ash and Rosie are hoping to win over their guests with quirky rooms and a healthy dose of neon lights, but it all proves a bit too bright for some of the BandBers.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Cardiff is calling for the BandBers as they head to Crofts Hotel in the Welsh capital, run by experienced chef Lorraine. The guests are left uninspired by the bland decoration in their rooms, and the prevailing feeling is that everythings a bit basic.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host is Anthony, at The Hollybush Inn in Priors Marston, Warwickshire. His 16th-century coaching inn has plenty of history, and the BandBers are wowed at first, but then they discover that the cleanliness needs bringing up to date.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are off glamping for the final visit of the week, at The Pretty Thing glampsite in St Osyth, Essex, run by Phil. Theres a melee of mixed emotions when the guests arrive, with Lorraine and Anthony left feeling cold by the communal showers.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition, and the BandBers reconvene to feud about facilities, bicker over beds and cross swords over sausages, before the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are off to Northampton to take on one of the strangest vehicles in British automotive history - a 1970 three-wheeled Bond Bug. The car is owned by 69-year-old Parkinsons victim Ian.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are taking on a neglected 1988 Fiat Uno Turbo. The car belongs to former car salesman Gerry, who has been suffering from ill health.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopps with childhood sweethearts Andy and Jenny from Warrington, who are desperate to buy their first home and start a family, but their differing approach to house hunting has meant only one near miss in six months of searching.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: In the village of Clifford, Kirstie and Phil meet Vic and Paul. From the outside their idyllic home looks perfect for a family, but appearances can be deceptive. From the off its clear that both Kirstie and Phil wont have it easy.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kara and Jonny are building a striking stone and zinc four-bedroom family home in the rolling hills of West Yorkshire. Building their single storey pushes them to the edge, but if they can pull it off, it might redefine what accessible design means.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: An episode looking at the lottery of life through the eyes of patients and their relatives in AandE. Alyce, whos 89, is brought to Kings by ambulance after falling near her home. Shes accompanied by her neighbour and close friend Linda.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: How can a trip to AandE act as a long overdue wake-up call? Malcolm has been rushed to Kings after suffering a cardiac arrest, and is on life support.

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man with a fast heart rate and chest pains, a woman who has fallen over on her broken shoulder, and a man with an irregular heartbeat.

programme.desc: When all the childrens phones go missing at school, Alvin is blamed for the theft.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.desc: While training for a TV baking competition with Eleanor, Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient. // After a lice outbreak that closes the school, Dave sets up a classroom in the house acting as their teacher.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When the girls at school develop a crush on the fire marshal, Alvin decides to be a hero with disastrous results; after causing an accident at a historic castle, Cheesy and Alvin work as reenactors to pay for the damage.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: My Sister the Weirdo; Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette seeks Alvins advice when she wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party. Alvin decides to borrow Brittanys babysitting job.

programme.sub-title: Baby Whisperer; Lets Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: In order to get Theodore to do his bidding, Alvin tells him that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy; when the chipmunks find a baby bird that has fallen from its nest, Alvin is reluctant to get too attached.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Brittany is hurt before a major school event, Jeanette fills in as the Principals assistant. When Bocarters father helps him with his class project, Alvin enlists Daves help, locking the families in a heated competition.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave gets temporary amnesia so the boys trick him into letting them skip school and go on a ski trip instead. Theodore becomes obsessed with cleanliness after a speaker at school talks to the class about the danger of germs.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: Big Bro Theodore / No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks hes the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon. Alvin tricks Theodore into believing hes great at mini golf, which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: In an effort to be more productive, Simon invents a device that can override the need to sleep; Alvin gets a taste of his own medicine when he zaps Dave with a youth ray, turning him into an irresponsible teen.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: After a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. Theodore posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a big hit.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin decides to rent out the familys house for a Hawaiian home swap.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Eleanor prepares her signature cake for the big Bake-Off competition and leaves it out to cool.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead. When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croners basement, the chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences. Brittanys furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog and vows to get him back.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: To land the lead role in a play, Alvin wagers Brittany that he can remain in character as a shoe cobbler. When Brittany becomes convinced shes a long-lost princess, she carries her new royal status a little too far.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave has a writers block. Alvin puts a curse on Theodore.

programme.sub-title: To Serve and Protect; Kickin It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he is elected as the schools safety monitor. Dave brings the Chipmunks on a technology-free camping trip.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simons magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but finds his classmates treat him differently as a teacher.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When one of Simons inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places and now each must live as the other.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: The Great Chipmunk Detective; Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she wont reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: The boys disobey Daves orders to not play a dangerous game, then have to hide their injuries when they get hurt. The school newspaper has a sudden increase in sales when a gossip column appears poking fun at other students.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Brittany hastily enters a skateboard contest against a skate park bully even though she has no clue how to ride; complaints rise as Simons robot Geizmo goes around town dismantling washing machines.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of a dangerous toy sports car; Alvin must pass a manners course to prove he is worthy of meeting a princess.

programme.sub-title: Alvins Wild Weekend/For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. Dave agrees and gets sucked into a series of wild Alvin adventures. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before hes scheduled to participate in an academic contest.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin is accused of revealing spoilers for everyones favourite TV show, he agrees not to speak for 24 hours. When Alvin and Simon think Theodores pet goldfish has died, they go all out to replace it before he notices.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Miss Croner attempts to help Theodore discover his true calling in life. Jeanette is suddenly the clumsiest person on the planet.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: A Room of Ones Own; Carts and Crafts
programme.desc: Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room; after Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodores bike, he enters the boys in a round up of shopping carts where the first prize is a new bike.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When the Principals cat goes missing, Theodore gives her a music box. When Dave discovers his Grandmas music box is missing, he calls the police. Theodores been mistakenly mailed off in a box. Now Simon and Alvin have to get him home.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover that he has been tagging private property in his sleep. Alvins luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover and everything starts going his way.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When pirates show up at the house, the boys do all they can to protect a treasure chest that arrived for Dave. The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete to set a world record in hopes of winning a new virtual reality game.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvins attempts to earn money as an Internet influencer almost puts a local toy store out of business; the Chipmunks accidentally ruin Daves new pavilion, and they allow Miss Miller to take the fall.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: Run Aimee Run; Theo vs. Simon
programme.desc: The Munks help a world-famous runner design a pair of prosthetic legs for a race shes set to run in. Theodore embarks on a quest to find one thing he can do better than Simon, and he quickly realises it wont be easy.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: In order to get Theodore to do his bidding, Alvin tells him that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy; when the chipmunks find a baby bird that has fallen from its nest, Alvin is reluctant to get too attached.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Brittany is hurt before a major school event, Jeanette fills in as the Principals assistant. When Bocarters father helps him with his class project, Alvin enlists Daves help, locking the families in a heated competition.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave gets temporary amnesia so the boys trick him into letting them skip school and go on a ski trip instead. Theodore becomes obsessed with cleanliness after a speaker at school talks to the class about the danger of germs.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: Big Bro Theodore / No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks hes the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon. Alvin tricks Theodore into believing hes great at mini golf, which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: In an effort to be more productive, Simon invents a device that can override the need to sleep; Alvin gets a taste of his own medicine when he zaps Dave with a youth ray, turning him into an irresponsible teen.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: After a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. Theodore posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a big hit.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin decides to rent out the familys house for a Hawaiian home swap.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Eleanor prepares her signature cake for the big Bake-Off competition and leaves it out to cool.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Theodores teddy bear, Talking Teddy, gets bear-napped, the boys work with Officer Dangus to get him back. When Alvin starts stealing the morning paper to sell at school, Dave blames the paperboy and refuses to pay up.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Theodore helps Simon to try and get past his perfectionism in order to complete an art assignment for art class. Simon has a crush on the babysitter and secretly prepares a romantic dinner while Theodore keeps Alvin distracted.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: After a big fight with Miss Miller, Miss Croner hides out in the chipmunks treehouse to make Miss Miller worried; Alvin bets Simon that time travelling is possible and hires an actor to pose as one, but a real one shows up.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin believes a neighbour is responsible for a recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to a big soccer game.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves; Alvin befriends a new student, but Theodore learns something surprising about him.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced that Theodore has cursed him to never lie again and cant help himself from blabbing the truth.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When one of Simons inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places and now each must live as the other.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: Theos Big Night Out; The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleepovers by spending the night at Kevins house without Alvin or Simon. Plus, when Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the limited edition skateboard hes always wanted but Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the limited edition skateboard hes always wanted but Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.desc: These peculiar and roughly rabbit-sized rodents enjoy great popularity at the GroSSglockner in the Austrian Alps. Before the last ice age, marmots used to live in the lowland of Tirol, but with the melting of the glaciers they were driven higher up into the mountains - a trend that will continue given the current climate change.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: A Girl Cant Always Have Everything
programme.desc: Two struggling theatre actresses have very different off-stage personas. Suzy is a gold-digger who soon begins milking the theatres new backer for expensive gifts, but when he then wants to marry her, she calls on her more mild-mannered friend Pat for help. How loyal is she?

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A pair of sisters decide to play a devious game when the man who bought their house arrives for a visit. They serve up something extra special in their tea and cookies, in order to keep their home in the family.

The programme tells the story behind the writing, recording and subsequent success of Rio through interviews with members of the band.

programme.title: The Strange Case Of Dr Jekyll And Mr Hyde
programme.desc: Concerned by Dr Jekylls behaviour, Gabriel Utterson works to uncover the identity of the dangerous Mr Hyde. Unique retelling of the gothic tale from the National Theatre of Scotland.

programme.title: The Strange Case Of Dr Jekyll And Mr Hyde
programme.desc: Concerned by Dr Jekylls behaviour, Gabriel Utterson works to uncover the identity of the dangerous Mr Hyde. Unique retelling of the gothic tale from the National Theatre of Scotland.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Royal Warriors
programme.desc: A Hong Kong police officer and a flight security agent form an alliance to foil a hijacking.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: To the court of the King of Qin, who seeks to rule the united country, comes Nameless, who claims to have killed three deadly assassins who were all determined to kill the King. As Nameless recounts his exploits in flashback, each time the wily King responds with his version. Is Nameless a true servant of Qin or does he have a secret agenda?

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duos only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers, young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs. Mutants
programme.desc: Gotham City faces catastrophe when Mr Freeze transforms Killer Croc and Bane into mega-sized mutant monsters. As the gigantic villains go on the rampage, its up to the caped crusader to cut them down to size.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: A fast-talking fish gains fame after taking credit for the accidental death of a shark mobster. While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the sharks enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A life-saving surgery fuses together a police officer and his faithful police dog -- and Dog Man is born. Learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: Burning an Illusion
programme.desc: A young British-born black woman begins to question her attitude to love and life, and her desire for middle-class respectability and security through marriage.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: A soldier returns from Vietnam to find his boyhood friend, also a fellow soldier, in a military hospital, having suffered a mental breakdown in which he has become detached from reality and imagines that he is a bird.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey together.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Burning an Illusion
programme.desc: A young British-born black woman begins to question her attitude to love and life, and her desire for middle-class respectability and security through marriage.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: Paulie
programme.desc: A wisecracking parrot caged in a research lab tells his life story to a lonely janitor. Before coming to the science lab, he has passed through the hands of a succession of owners, from a petty criminal to a man who runs a parrot-dancing act. Touched by his colourful story, the janitor conspires to liberate the talking bird.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: LEGO DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman (Nolan North), Batman (Troy Baker) and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid (Frank Welker).

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans are sent to live with their uncle Count Olaf, but he only wants their family fortune. What follows is a battle of wits.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. The attraction appears to lure its young visitors in very strange ways and it is up to Scooby, Shaggy and the gang to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: Creepy fairy tale following the fortunes of a young orphan who becomes embroiled in a supernatural adventure. Brought up on his kindly grandmothers scary stories about witches, he stumbles on a real coven while on holiday. Overhearing their plans to capture all the children in Britain, he sets out to stop them, remaining undeterred throughout - even when he has been turned into a mouse.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Dannys problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: It Takes Two
programme.desc: When a foster child meets the daughter of a bazillionaire, they hatch a plan to solve the problems in their life, and switch identities.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Swede Caroline
programme.desc: As Caroline readies herself for the championship, the competitive giant vegetable-growing world is rocked by scandal. Her prized marrow plants are stolen, and her life turns upside down, so she hires two private detectives.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Viking Age in Britain and visits excavations that are revealing a different side to these seafaring pirates from Scandinavia. programme.title: Clifford

programme.title: Clifford
